headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 14, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees suffered a dominant 7-0 loss to the Baltimore Orioles, while the Cleveland Guardians secured a 2-4 victory over the Los Angeles Angels. The Washington Nationals edged the Cincinnati Reds in a thrilling 8-7 matchup, and the Colorado Rockies routed the Pittsburgh Pirates 10-4. 

Injuries and availability have impacted several teams, with Cal Raleigh being placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain for the Seattle Mariners. Other notable injuries include Jimmy Herget (Colorado Rockies) and Brooks Kriske (Athletics) being placed on the 15-day injured list, as well as Robby Snelling (Miami Marlins), Francisco Alvarez (New York Mets), Rhett Lowder (Cincinnati Reds), Drew Pomeranz (Los Angeles Angels), and Dylan Beavers (Baltimore Orioles) being placed on the injured list.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place, including the Seattle Mariners trading LHP José Suarez to the Athletics for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks acquired OF Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for CF Alek Thomas, while the San Francisco Giants traded C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired RHP Enyel Garcia and RHP Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees were shut down by the Baltimore Orioles, who took a 7-0 victory. Adley Rutschman led the Orioles' offense with a home run, three RBIs, and a 1-for-3 performance at the plate.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Angels in 2-4 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 2-4 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Parker Messick earning the win after 6.2 innings of work. Zach Neto led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Reds in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a hard-fought win over the Cincinnati Reds, outlasting their opponents in a high-scoring matchup. Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with a home run and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rout Pirates 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 10-4 victory. Mickey Moniak led the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 5-RBI performance.

top_news.title: **Raleigh Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners catcher Cal Raleigh has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain.

top_news.title: **Mariners Make Roster Move Ahead of Weekend Series**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners have made a trade, sending LHP José Suarez to the Athletics in exchange for cash.
